Brand identity package delivered to the retainer client this week.
Hand-lettering a bridal signage commission — brush pens and gouache.
Wednesday 9 PM call with Grandma Florence, the standing line.
Quarterly lettering workshop at the Arts Center, twelve seats full.
Portfolio relaunch on Webflow this October with the new case studies.
Etsy order shipped — a letterpress print and a watercolor original.
Saturday brunch with Amy, ten years of standing plans.
Styled shoot with Jasmine, traded lettering for the photos.
Sunday lunch with Mom, the standing family event.
Lifted the commission floor to $55 after the talk with Lena.
Yoga With Adriene at 6:30, the slower practice before the desk.
Rouge River trail walk this afternoon, one to two miles.
Lo-fi and bossa nova for studio hours, the daily soundtrack.
Wrist brace on for the long lettering session; stretches after.
Client contract and invoice out through HoneyBook.
Al-Ameer for Lebanese, Avalon breads for the cortado.
Private Greenhouse view of in-house design roles; only Lena knows.
QuickBooks Self-Employed reconciled, quarterly estimate on the 15th.
Anthology pour-over at the desk, amber bulb on.
Bike ride with Rami if the weather holds this weekend.
The Pinterest lettering board no one has seen, growing slowly.
Case study written up; the kerning pair finally sits right.
Household contribution to Mom and Dad on the 1st.
Reading Celeste Ng on the iPad before bed.
